mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password_hash, nickname, phone, status) values (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{status})
mapper.update: update sys_user set password_hash = #{passwordHash} where id = #{id}
update sys_user set nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_user set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
update sys_user set sub_pin = #{subPin} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, username, password_hash, nickname, phone, email, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_user order by id asc
